description: Build a household location choice model using San Francisco UrbanSim data in the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/location_choice.ipynb. Estimate a logistic regression model predicting household location choices using at least three building characteristics (such as residential_sales_price, building_sqft, or year_built) from the 'households' and 'buildings' tables in /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. The model must use a binary dependent variable representing location quality or choice. Export the coefficients to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/location_choice_coefficients.csv (with 'variable' and 'coefficient' columns) and save a bar chart of the coefficient magnitudes to
